svg.title: Progress note readiness check – 7 questions
svg.desc: Seven-question self-check to run before finalising a psychology progress note.
svg.text: Readiness check — before you finalise a progress note
Does the note clearly describe how the client presented today?
Is risk documented, even briefly — including when there are no concerns?
Does the note show what clinical intervention occurred this session?
Is there evidence of how the client engaged with or responded to the work?
Are next steps, tasks, and the next appointment documented?
Could a colleague pick up this file and understand where treatment stands?
Does the note avoid over-sharing information the client would not expect documented?
Your note is clear, specific, and clinically defensible — save it.
